warnings: Worker-tagged spray tasks are currently routed to the shared Tier 1 inhalation screening tool because it is the strongest bounded path implemented in this MCP.
limitations: The current Tier 1 inhalation path remains a deterministic NF/FF screening model and does not substitute for ART, measured workplace monitoring, or a validated occupational aerosol simulator.
rationale: Spray tasks can already be represented by the current Tier 1 NF/FF screening contract, which is the strongest worker-relevant inhalation path implemented in this MCP.
next_step: Call exposure_build_inhalation_tier1_screening_scenario and preserve tier_semantics, quality_flags, limitations, and any profile-alignment signals.
